steps.expected: Middleware checks totus_viewer cookie, verifies JWT, creates viewer context
steps.observed: Confirmed: lines 165-180 check totus_viewer cookie, call verifyViewerToken(), and create context = { role: 'viewer', userId: claims.ownerId, grantId: claims.grantId, permissions: { allowedMetrics, dataStart, dataEnd }, authMethod: 'viewer_jwt' }

steps.expected: Tries current secret then previous secret
steps.observed: Confirmed: verifyViewerToken tries currentSecret first, then previousSecret (dual-secret rotation)

steps.expected: Owner tests pass: full access to own data, all metrics unchanged, all dates unchanged
steps.observed: 21/21 tests passed. Specific owner tests: 'allows full access to own data', 'returns all requested metrics unchanged', 'returns all requested dates unchanged' all pass
Confirmed: owner branch returns { userId: scope.userId, metrics: scope.metrics, startDate: scope.startDate, endDate: scope.endDate } — no narrowing applied

steps.expected: Viewer tests pass: metrics intersected, dates clamped, empty intersection throws
steps.observed: 21/21 tests passed. Viewer tests confirmed: 'intersects requested metrics with granted metrics', 'narrows to granted metrics when request includes extras', 'clamps start date to grant boundary', 'clamps end date to grant boundary', 'throws when no metrics overlap', 'throws when date range is entirely outside grant window'

steps.expected: Viewer path intersects metrics and clamps dates
steps.observed: Confirmed: viewer branch filters metrics via allowedMetrics.includes(), clamps startDate via maxDate(), clamps endDate via minDate(), throws if intersection empty or dates invalid
